description_long: This object is a classic wooden sled, featuring a flat, slatted seating surface made from several parallel wooden planks. The sled is supported by two long, curved wooden runners that extend forward and curve upward, providing both stability and the ability to glide over snow. Metal strips are attached to the bottom of the runners, likely for reduced friction and increased durability. The sled is reinforced with crossbars and has a simple, open frame construction, with no visible engine, track, or modern snowmobile features. There is a thin metal rod connecting the front ends of the runners, likely for structural support. The overall design is utilitarian and traditional, suitable for manual use on snowy surfaces.
description: A traditional wooden sled with curved runners, slatted seat, and metal reinforcements, designed for gliding over snow. The construction is open and simple, with no engine or modern snowmobile features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the parallel wooden slats and the upward curve of the runners, with the metal rod connecting the front tips.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the sled, the pronounced curve of the runners, and the flat seating surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the parallel arrangement of the slats and the straight alignment of the runners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the sled's length, runner curvature, and open frame.
attribute_handlebar_design: No handlebar is present; the sled features a simple open frame with a metal rod connecting the front of the runners.
attribute_ski_configuration: Two long, curved wooden runners act as skis, each reinforced with a metal strip on the bottom for durability and reduced friction.
attribute_track_presence: No continuous rear track is present; the sled relies solely on its two runners for movement.
attribute_seat_style: The seat consists of several flat, parallel wooden slats forming a simple, unpadded surface, suitable for one or two riders sitting in tandem.
attribute_windshield_shape: No windshield is present on this sled.
